entries.d:
v call forth (emotions, feelings, and responses)
v evoke or provoke to appear or occur
v deduce (a principle) or construe (a meaning)
v summon into action or bring into existence, often as if by magic
v call to mind
forms: 当前词形：第三人称单数

entries.t: v. 产生, 引起, 唤起( evoke的现在分词 )
entries.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Evoke

entries.t:
n. 渐屈线
a. 展开的, 反卷的
entries.d:
n. A curve from which another curve, called the involute or
evolvent, is described by the end of a thread gradually wound upon the
former, or unwound from it. See Involute. It is the locus of the
centers of all the circles which are osculatory to the given curve or
evolvent.
